allow: PowerShell($errors = $null; $tokens = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(\(Resolve-Path 'scripts/ops/provision/provision_entra_oidc.ps1'\).Path, [ref]$null, [ref]$errors\); if \($errors\) { $errors | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } } else { Write-Output 'parse-ok' })
